questions.scenario: Checkout completes and the system needs to send a receipt later. What is the event-shaped view?

options.text: An order-created event can trigger bounded side work.
The customer must wait for every email provider call.
A VM must be patched for every receipt.
A Kubernetes cluster is required because events exist.

questions.explanation: The side work starts because checkout happened, which fits event-driven handling.

questions.scenario: A function receives a receipt event. Which fields are useful without copying the whole database record into the event?

options.text: Order ID, customer ID, and correlation ID.
Every table row in the system.
The billing account display name only.

questions.explanation: Events should carry enough context to do the job without becoming fragile full data copies.

options.text: A file is created in Cloud Storage.
A service owns many long-running HTTP routes.

questions.explanation: Functions fit bounded work that starts because something happened.
